problem id: 9cecae80
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(1) XOR SHR(3)

examples:
  10110001 -> 01110100
  01001000 -> 10011001
  01111000 -> 11111111
  01000100 -> 10000000
  10000111 -> 00011110
  01100101 -> 11000110
  10101001 -> 01000111
  01010010 -> 10101110

query: 11100001
predicted answer: 11011110
